title: We Don't Talk Anymore
why_this_song: We Don't Talk Anymore by Charlie Puth (2016) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 43 times; first heard in: "We don't talk anymore"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "We don't talk anymore"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "We don't talk anymore"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Like we used to do"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "What kind of dress you're wearing tonight"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: What was all of it for?
Should've known your love was a game
Now I can't get you out of my brain

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "anymore" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "anymore" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Charlie Puth one question about "We Don't Talk Anymore", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Charlie Puth sobre "We Don't Talk Anymore", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "We Don't Talk Anymore" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "We Don't Talk Anymore" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "We Don't Talk Anymore" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "We Don't Talk Anymore" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
